Sweetness Without Compromise

A premium stevia sweetener designed for everyday use. Convenient single-serve sachets for coffee, tea, baking and healthy living.

Zero Sugar Great Taste Plant-Based Low Calorie Suitable for Daily Use
Contact Us
Benefits

Why Choose Stevia Verde?

Stevia Verde provides a practical alternative to sugar while maintaining the sweetness consumers enjoy every day.

📦

Convenient Sachets

Individual 2g portions ready to use — no measuring, no mess. Perfect for on-the-go lifestyles.

✨

Great Taste

A balanced sweetness experience inspired by European café culture, delivering natural flavour without bitterness.

⚖️

Portion Control

Every sachet delivers an exact serving. Know exactly what you're consuming with no guesswork.

☕

Coffee & Tea Ready

Dissolves effortlessly in hot and cold beverages, enhancing flavour without overpowering it.

🍽️

Baking & Cooking

Heat-stable formula that works equally well in recipes, desserts, smoothies and everyday cooking.

🏢

Home, Office & Hospitality

Crafted for homes, cafés, offices and hospitality environments that care about quality.

Our Product

Stevia Verde Sweetener Sachets

A premium stevia and erythritol blend in a convenient square sachet format, designed for modern consumers who refuse to compromise on taste or health.

Product Specifications

  • 2g per sachet — precise, measured serving every time
  • Easy-open square packaging for effortless use
  • Individual portion control — no measuring needed
  • Convenient for travel, dining and office use
  • Designed for both hot and cold beverages

Packaging

  • 100 sachets per box — net weight 100g
  • Premium retail presentation, bilingual labelling
  • Compact, stackable and easy to store

Ingredients

  • Erythritol, Steviol Glycosides (Stevia Extract)
  • Non-GMO · Gluten Free · No Artificial Colors · Vegan
Versatility

Perfect For

☕Coffee
🍵Tea
💪Protein Shakes
🥤Smoothies
🍮Desserts
🥐Baking
🍽️Restaurants
🏨Hotels
🏢Offices

Standards

Quality & Compliance

Every sachet of Stevia Verde is produced to the highest standards, ensuring safety, purity and compliance for consumers worldwide.

☪️
Halal Certified
Certified Halal — suitable for Muslim consumers and hospitality environments across the region.
🏭
Manufactured in China
Produced in a certified manufacturing facility with strict quality controls and international standards.
🛡️
FDA Registered Facility
Manufactured in an FDA-registered facility, meeting rigorous food safety and regulatory requirements.
🔬
Quality Tested
Every batch is tested for purity, consistency and safety before reaching consumers.
✅
Suitable for Daily Use
Safe, gentle and effective for everyday consumption as part of a balanced, healthy lifestyle.
Business & Hospitality

For Business & Hospitality

Stevia Verde is the ideal sweetener solution for professional environments. Our premium sachets are designed to elevate the experience offered to guests, staff and customers alike.
